name: Goal-to-Pipeline Workbench
description: A planning template that turns a messy goal into an editable action map.

nodes.label: Initial Intake
nodes.description: Capture the user's current situation, resources, constraints, and target outcome.
questions: What do you want to change?
What resources do you already have?
How much time can you commit?

nodes.label: AI Follow-up Questions
nodes.description: Generate context-specific questions from the user's intake answers.
questions: What is the real motivation behind this goal?
Is the biggest constraint time, energy, money, skill, or support?
What would you lose if nothing changes?
Which decision keeps you stuck right now?

nodes.label: Problem Reflection
nodes.description: Summarize the understood problem and ask the user to confirm or correct it.

nodes.label: Goal Decomposition
nodes.description: Break the confirmed goal into subgoals, milestones, decision points, risks, and actions.

nodes.label: First 7 Days
nodes.description: Define the smallest visible proof that the user can complete in the first week.

nodes.label: First 30 Days
nodes.description: Define the first meaningful outcome and review point.

nodes.label: Risks and Anti-Goals
nodes.description: List what could make the plan unrealistic and what the user should avoid.

nodes.label: Review Checkpoints
nodes.description: Create review moments where the user can revise the plan instead of blindly continuing.

nodes.label: Optional Spiritual Support
nodes.description: Only suggest Esma, dua, or dhikr practices when the user enables spiritual support in settings.

spiritualPractices.label: YA FETTAH
spiritualPractices.reason: Example support practice for goals involving learning, opening a path, or making progress. It must remain optional and source-reviewed.

nodes.label: View Selection
nodes.description: Render the same plan as kanban, timeline, graph, table, or pipeline.

edges.condition: user confirms or edits the reflection
user has enabled spiritual support in settings
the plan no longer matches reality
